notes: Two additions. (1) Per-user config dashboard: when a user opens their subscription link in a browser they get a friendly page with a QR code, a copy button, and one-tap 'Add to app' for every client (Hiddify, v2rayNG, FlClash/Clash Meta, sing-box/NekoBox, Karing, Streisand), plus copy-subscription — bilingual Farsi/English, light/dark. Apps still receive their config directly. (2) Smart IP: turn on Smart IP mode (Settings -> Clean IPs) and point it at a GitHub folder of per-carrier clean-IP lists; the Worker detects each user's Iranian operator (MCI, Irancell, Rightel, Shatel) and auto-serves the matching list (mci/mtn/rightel/shatel.txt, falling back to ir/all), so users no longer need to run NovaRadar. Both are opt-in and additive. Includes 3.8.1 (real-time mid-session quota cutoff + optional non-TLS mode) and everything from 3.8.0. Update in-app from Settings -> Update panel.
